name: Public Pool
description: A solo Bitcoin mining pool. Point your miners at its Stratum port and mine directly against your own Bitcoin Core node.
compose:
name: "slashnode-public-pool"
services:
  server:
    image: "ghcr.io/benjamin-wilson/public-pool:95565ee"
    container_name: "public-pool-server"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: "production"
      BITCOIN_RPC_URL: "http://${bitcoind.exports.rpc.host}"
      BITCOIN_RPC_USER: "${bitcoind.exports.rpc.user}"
      BITCOIN_RPC_PASSWORD: "${bitcoind.exports.rpc.password}"
      BITCOIN_RPC_PORT: "8332"
      BITCOIN_RPC_TIMEOUT: "10000"
      API_PORT: "2019"
      STRATUM_PORT: "2018"
      NETWORK: "mainnet"
      API_SECURE: "false"
      ENABLE_SOLO: "true"
      ENABLE_PROXY: "false"
      POOL_IDENTIFIER: "Public Pool on SlashNode"
    ports:
      - "2018:2018/tcp"
    volumes:
      - "public-pool-data:/public-pool/DB"
  web:
    image: "ghcr.io/benjamin-wilson/public-pool-ui:5f730f4"
    container_name: "public-pool-web"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      DOMAIN: "${node.exports.host}"
      PUBLIC_POOL_API_URL: ""
      PUBLIC_POOL_STRATUM_URL: "${node.exports.host}:2018"
  proxy:
    image: "nginx:1.25.3"
    container_name: "public-pool-proxy"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - web
      - server
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:2080:80"
    volumes:
      - "./config/default.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  public-pool-data:
    name: "slashnode-public-pool_server_public-pool-data"
notes: Solo mining pool backed by your Bitcoin Core node. Point miners at the Stratum endpoint on port 2018 (clearnet host:2018). The web dashboard is served behind Caddy. Requires a fully-synced Bitcoin Core.
